description: ITOOLFIRM HSS M42 Bi-Metal Hole Saw Features: Premium quality hole drill. The edge of the saw blade is not easy to fall off. With special carbide cutting edges for precise cuts. Excellent chip removal thanks to extra large chip spaces. Ready to use - no separate mandrel required. Please note: 1. Insert the mandrel through the bottom to the tip of the saw blade. 2. When cutting metal materials, remember to add coolant; 3. Cut material must be fixed, it can be moved and opened to a 90 degree angle. 4. During operation or if an abnormal discharge cut is unsatisfactory, please stop working; 5. Please make sure you have firmly attached the s to the side of the mandrel with hex key and have no wobbling to ensure precise cutting. 6. Remove the spring when processing more than 10 mm thick. If you have any problem, please contact us (by email by Amazon) our customer service, we will reply within 6 hours.
